name: MOD Sync Checker / 模组同步检测器
author: K2 & Xiatingfeng
description:
Compare your mod list with teammates before co-op. Supports exporting/importing MOD profiles to quickly sync with friends.

与队友联机前快速对比 MOD 列表，支持导出/导入 MOD 配置文件，方便与好友同步模组。

Features:
- One-click scan via K key or main menu button
- Visual diff: missing mods, version mismatches, load order differences
- Export/import MOD profiles as JSON
- Auto-select imported profile for instant comparison
- Clear search filter on import to ensure file visibility
- Friendly hint when applying load order before game start
- Draggable window with title bar
- Minimize / Maximize / Close window controls
- Resize handle at bottom-right corner

功能：
- 按 K 键或主菜单按钮一键扫描
- 直观对比：缺失模组、版本不一致、加载顺序差异
- 导出/导入 JSON 配置文件
- 导入后自动选中文件并显示对比
- 导入时自动清空搜索过滤，确保文件可见
- 应用排序前检测游戏状态，给出友好提示
- 可拖拽移动的窗口标题栏
- 最小化 / 最大化 / 关闭按钮
- 右下角手柄自由缩放窗口
